zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich von Burgau IV, Count of Burgau於1233年出生在德國時，他的父親Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN56歲，母親Adelheid von Schelklingen46歲。他和Adelheid von Alpeck-teck至少有1個女兒。他去世於1293年7月20日在他的家鄉享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Burgau
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Gaetan, Luc, Aime, Amie, Andre, Armand, Dany, Fernand, Gaston, Gilles, Jean Louis.
French: from Old French, Old Occitan bureau, a diminutive of b(o)ure ‘frieze’ (see Burel ).
History: Louis Bureau dit Sansoucy from Saint-Jacques-de-Pirmel in Loire-Atlantique, Brittany (France), married Marie-Anne Gauvin in QC in 1685.

variants.name: Burel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Henri, Julienne, Patrice, Serge.

French: metonymic occupational name for a worker in the wool trade or perhaps a nickname for someone who habitually dressed in brown, from Old French burel, borel, a diminutive of b(o)ure ‘frieze’, a type of coarse reddish brown woolen cloth with long hairs (from Late Latin burra ‘coarse untreated wool’).

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich von Burgau IV, Count of Burgau was born in 1233, in Germany, his father, Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN, was 56 and his mother, Adelheid von Schelklingen, was 46. He had at least 1 daughter with Adelheid von Alpeck-teck. He died on 20 July 1293, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich von Burgau IV, Count of Burgau est né en 1233, à Allemagne, son père, Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Schelklingen, avait 46 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Adelheid von Alpeck-teck. Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1293, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich von Burgau IV, Count of Burgau 1233 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN 56 und seine Mutter Adelheid von Schelklingen 46. Er hatte mit Adelheid von Alpeck-teck mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. Juli 1293 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich von Burgau IV, Count of Burgau è nato il nel 1233 nel Germania, il suo padre, Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von Schelklingen, aveva 46 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Adelheid von Alpeck-teck. Morì il 20 luglio 1293, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich von Burgau IV, Count of Burgauが1233年にドイツで生まれた時，父Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGENは56歳，母Adelheid von Schelklingenは46歳であった。彼はAdelheid von Alpeck-teckとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1293年7月20日に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich von Burgau IV, Count of Burgau(이)가 1233년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Schelklingen(은)는 46세였다. 그는 Adelheid von Alpeck-teck(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1293년 7월 20일 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Adelheid von Alpeck-teck. Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1293, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich von Burgau IV, Count of Burgau родился в 1233 г. в местности Германия, его отцу по имени Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Schelklingen, 46. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Adelheid von Alpeck-teck. Он умер 20 июля 1293 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich von Burgau IV, Count of Burgau nació en 1233, en Alemania, su papá, Heinrich III VON BERG-SCHELKLINGEN, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Schelklingen, tenía 46 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Adelheid von Alpeck-teck. Murió el 20 de julio de 1293, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
